dep.name: @opencode-ai/plugin
dep.purpose: Type-safe OpenCode plugin API and hook definitions

dep.name: @opencode-ai/sdk
dep.purpose: OpenCode client types and runtime interactions used by Guardian

dep.name: citty
dep.purpose: CLI command tree and argument parsing for `vvoc`

dep.name: jsonc-parser
dep.purpose: Safe JSONC-aware config parsing and in-place edits

constraint.reason: The package and local verification target Bun-based runtime and test execution.
Guardian depends on the current plugin hook and input shape.
Guardian uses current SDK message, part, and config types.

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic checks for config merge and Guardian config rendering.

wave-level.focus: Checks merged CLI and helper behavior with lint and format verification included.

phase-level.command: bun run check && bun run build
phase-level.focus: Validates package output and regression-safe baseline behavior after quality gates pass.

Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer direct pure-function verification and fixture text over broad mocks.

Observability.logger: OpenCode app log via `client.app.log()` plus Guardian best-effort debug file in `/tmp`.
Observability.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, or raw high-risk payloads beyond the existing Guardian truncation policy.

DeliveryShape.shape: One public npm package that exports OpenCode plugins and ships a Bun CLI binary named `vvoc`.
